creator: ernie@eis.net.au
text:
The support for BRIDGE is missing from several ethernet drivers, specifically /usr/src/sys/i386/isa/if_ed.c

It does seem to be in /usr/src/sys/i386/isa/if_fe.c

and it is in 2.2.8-RELEASE

Fix: 

Install bridge patches from 2.2.8
How-To-Repeat: try and bring up bridging with the kernel the has options BRIDGE compiled in and it will give you a sysctl error.
